text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Are you nervous, Rice? You look tense. Are you
okay?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I just... really want to catch up with Bourbon
today...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But... as soon as I saw her, I froze up... I don't
know if I have what it takes to win.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Of course you do!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You've got this! I mean, you trained so hard you
practically wore your shoes down to tatters!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And even if you don't win, today will help fuel
your drive to win next time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, that's what I think about before every
race. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So, basically, you'll be fine! You'll be absolutely
fine, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Drawn in by Matikanetannhauser's smile, Rice
Shower's expression slowly begins to relax.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Tannhauser...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You're right... Thank you! I'm going to try my
hardest!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, no. I'm sorry! You're running today too, yet
here I am going on about Bourbon...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, no! I totally get it. It's Bourbon, after all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, speak of the devil! There she is! Go throw
down the gauntlet!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Throw down the gauntlet?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Words have power! Go on, now! Go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Why is Tannhauser hiding over there?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uuuuuh, um... Hey, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
L-let's have a... a good race today! I'm going to
catch up to you!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Rice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon firmly shakes Rice Shower's
trembling hand.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to a good race as well. I won't
let you beat me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: That's it! Great job, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She's grown so much since I started watching her
at the Satsuki Sho. It's just so moving!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I almost forgot, but she also hid at the entrance
of the runners' tunnel before the Satsuki Sho
when Mihono Bourbon was psyching herself up for
the race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? I just, you know... didn't
wanna get in the way.
choice_data_list: How could you be in the way?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You know how rivals shake hands at the climax of
a movie?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's not a moment for an ordinary gal like me
to barge in on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's a skilled runner who's got a very real chance
at winning.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you and your silver tongue. I've heard about
parents being blind to their children's faults, but
not trainers.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that doesn't matter right now! More
importantly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser suddenly thrusts her right
hand out and starts grabbing the air.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Right about... here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm doing an air handshake!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey! What's with that look?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Come on! We need enthusiasm if we're going to
live up to the director's expectations!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I may just be an ordinary Umamusume, but the
director has high hopes for me, so...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. It's just, I know this is a little late, but I just
realized something...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Why does she have high hopes for me? Why not Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
If she's looking for someone to guide others,
wouldn't Bourbon be the better choice? She's
guiding Rice, after all.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Well, whatever! Today I need to concentrate on
the race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With so many things to think about... the
Japanese Derby begins!
